# meok-eu-mobility-package-mcp

> EU Mobility Package compliance — EU 561/2006 drivers' hours, 4-week return-to-base, Posted Workers Directive, IMI declaration, EU 165/2014 Smart Tachograph 2. 27 member states. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- check_drivers_hours_eu
- check_return_to_base_4w
- check_vehicle_return_to_base_8w
- check_cabotage_3in7
- check_smart_tachograph_2_v2
- check_imi_posted_worker_declaration
- check_working_time_directive
- generate_eu_compliance_pack
- check_eu_aetr_third_country

## Install
```
pip install meok-eu-mobility-package-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-eu-mobility-package-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
